International Business student at Karelia UAS with hands-on experience in content creation, social media, digital marketing, and brand communication. Based in Joensuu, Finland.

About me

A creative communicator who loves making things

I'm Smirti BK, an International Business student from Nepal, recently graduated from Karelia University of Applied Sciences in Finland. I completed a five-month communication internship where I worked across content creation, social media management, video production, digital advertising, and brand research.

I'm passionate about the intersection of culture, communication, and creativity, and I'm always looking to learn new tools and approaches that help tell better stories.

Outside work, I enjoy photography, exploring new places, and connecting with people from different backgrounds.

Experience

Where I've worked

Communication Intern
Jan 2026 – Jun 2026
Karelia University of Applied Sciences — Joensuu, Finland
  • Produced two YouTube promotional videos (1–1.33 min) for English-taught study programmes
  • Managed Karelia's international Instagram account — created posts, reels, and GIF stickers
  • Co-produced a video podcast series, including brand identity, scripting, and recording
  • Built a marketing materials library for international education agents
  • Designed and ran Meta (Facebook & Instagram) ad campaigns with supervisor guidance
  • Analyzed performance of the Karelia Next podcast (reach, engagement, audience demographics)
  • Conducted research on 2026 social media trends to inform content strategy
  • Participated as a model in two marketing photoshoot sessions and one video shoot
  • Attended and presented in a webinar for education agents in Kathmandu, Nepal
Customer Service & Garden Help
Summer 2024 & 2024
Finland — [Botania OY]
  • First professional experience in Finnish work culture
  • Developed customer-facing communication skills in a Finnish-speaking environment
